name: Excavation Volume Calculator
seo_description: Calculate net and bulked excavation volume plus truck loads needed. Free earthwork calculator for foundations and site preparation.
example_label: Calculate excavation volume for a pit 10m x 8m x 3m deep with 1.25 swell factor.

range_hints.profundidad: Depends on frost depth and foundation type

result_context: Net volume: {vol_neto_m3} m³. Loose volume: {vol_esponjado_m3} m³. Trucks needed: {camiones_8m3}.
formula_display: Net = Length x Width x Depth; Loose = Net x Swell factor
mistakes: Not accounting for the swell factor when calculating transport volumes
Insufficient shoring or sloping for deep excavations
Forgetting extra workspace for formwork of perimeter walls
